texto: You'll look away from your own face in the mirror, pull the chain twice to hide from yourself in the dark, and when it's all over you won't fucking say anything. You won't fucking say anything to anyone ever.
explicacao: Citação de Tupelo Hassman sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “You'll look away from your own face in the mirror, pull the chain twice to hide from yourself in …” articula reflexao, silence, fucking em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e reflexao.

texto: Which statements are true according to the passage?A) Science, governments, and your doctor should be trusted.B) 'Comforting her deep into the night' is a euphemism for sneaking candy.C) The ugliest phrase used in this passage is 'female.'D) Bad things really do come in threes.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Tupelo Hassman que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Which statements are true according to the passage?A) Science, governments, and your doctor shoul…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, buck-vs-bell, feminism, com foco em boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.

texto: No matter how smart you might appear to be later with your set of diplomas on their fine white parchment, the mistakes you made before the real lessons sunk in never fade. No matter how high you hang those official documents with their official seals and signatures, how shinning and polished the frame, your reflection in the glass will never let you forget how stupid you felt when you didn't know any better.
explicacao: Citação de Tupelo Hassman sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “No matter how smart you might appear to be later with your set of diplomas on their fine white pa…” articula inteligencia, diploma, education em registro de inteligencia, com relevância para contextos como education e intelligence.
